title: OPA / Rego Parity Demo
subtitle: Import-equivalent RBAC policy compiled into a deterministic pearl with parity and runtime artifacts.
tagline: Same shell, different domain: this pack is about policy parity and portability rather than evidence checklists.

summary.problem: Teams want to preserve existing policy behavior while gaining portable artifacts, small runtimes, and reproducible parity checks.
summary.why_logicpearl: LogicPearl keeps the policy-core behavior deterministic, emits readable and executable artifacts, and validates parity against the original OPA behavior.
non_goals: Replacing observation/adaptation layers in this demo

sources.title: RBAC Rego Policy
